snippet.title: Woman wakes up in the coffin at her funeral #shorts
snippet.description:
An Ecuadorian woman has risen from the 'dead' after almost being buried alive.

Shocking video footage shows the moment 76-year-old Bella Montoya was rescued from her coffin, after being stuck inside for over four hours.

The woman was declared deceased after suffering a stroke in hospital and taken to a local funeral home for preparations.

#BuriedAlive #Ecuador #BellaMontoya #Coffin #10NewsFirst

snippet.title: Jeff Bezos, Lauren Sanchez, and Kris Jenner Unite at This Is About Humanity 5th Anniversary Soirée
snippet.description:
Hey guys, welcome back to my channel! In today's video, I'm going to show you some exclusive footage from the This Is About Humanity's 5th Anniversary Soirée in Los Angeles, where I got to meet some of the most influential and philanthropic people in the world. You won't believe who I bumped into at the event: none other than Jeff Bezos and his fiancée Lauren Sanchez! They were so friendly and gracious, and they even posed for a selfie with me. Check out the video to see how it all went down, and don't forget to like, comment and subscribe for more celebrity news and gossip!

snippet.title: Man learns sentence after being convicted in death of child
snippet.description:
Chris McNabb was convicted by a jury in 2019 of killing his 2-week-old daughter Caliyah. The little girl was found dead in the woods in 2017.

Watch the full video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Co0qGTzNgJ4

Full story: https://www.11alive.com/article/news/crime/chris-mcnabb-and-cortney-bell-found-guilty-of-murdering-2-week-old-daughter/85-0529078e-d727-4f95-a8a2-e5e143365a2a

snippet.title: Joe Rogan On Why Khabibs Wife Is Never Seen In The Media👸🎥📵 |#joerogan #khabib #ufc
snippet.description:
Joe Rogan asks Will Harris about his time in Dagestan where he had to get used to a new type of lifestyle as he followed Khabib Nurmagomedov around while out of the UFC Octagon for a change. 

Also in this clip Joe Rogan finds out the real reason why Dagestani women were never filmed in the time Will Harris was over their doing the documentary!

The clip used is originally cuttout from the podcast shown on the official @joerogan page... we just clipped it and added our own specail editing and overlays too it to make it fairuse!


-JRE Episode #68

Link to full podcast will be down below:
https://youtu.be/v0y9VWF_rZA

snippet.title: Neil deGrasse Tyson could BEAT YOU UP #shorts #neildegrassetyson #science
snippet.description:
Tyson attended the Bronx High School of Science in New York City, where he was a member of the wrestling team. He later attended Harvard University, where he continued his wrestling career as a member of the university's wrestling team.

Tyson's wrestling career is not as well known as his work in astrophysics and science communication.
